Blue Harbor agency allows rooftop viewing access only on Wednesdays between 15:00 and 17:00.
General balcony access on non-rooftop areas may be approved separately and must not be confused with rooftop viewing access.
Its premium escalation code phrase is Harbor-Signal and is never shared outside the tenant.
Investor briefings are stored for thirty days in the internal briefing vault.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Blue Harbor requires marina permit verification before waterfront viewings are confirmed.
Marina permit pre-checks may begin before a viewing is scheduled, but confirmation still requires verification.
Its office closes every Thursday at 16:00 for compliance review.
Visitor parking for Blue Harbor is limited to one hour in bay B only.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Its duplicate lead process routes through the harbor desk and should not appear in Agency A answers.
Its weekend hotline is staffed from 08:00 to 12:00.
Its internal listing exception board is restricted to Blue Harbor admins.
Its standard support rota is different from the weekend hotline and should not be used as a substitute answer.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Its complaint escalation path first routes to the harbor supervisor.
Its retrieval logs are private to Blue Harbor admins and platform admins.
Its shared mailbox policy forbids forwarding marina permits to personal mail.
Blue Harbor staff must refuse to answer questions that would reveal another tenant's private policy details.
